step.name: inventory-triggers
step.action: List every trigger (human click, batch job, schedule) for the assistant.

step.name: score-patterns
step.action: Score sidebar / modal / inline / review against rules.

step.name: pick-pattern
step.action: Choose highest scorer; document why others were rejected.

step.name: define-fallback
step.action: Define behaviour when assistant fails (rate-limit, timeout, low-confidence).

step.name: plan-telemetry
step.action: List accept / reject / ignore + custom signals to emit.
